sqlMap.select: SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYDOCCOUNTLOG B JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER A ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DeptID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7)

SELECT REGDATE , B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_S907000.TBFORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_S907000.TBFORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND B.FORMID = #searchID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) ORDER BY FORMID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.FORMID, CASE WHEN #lang# = 1 THEN B.FORMNAME ELSE B.FORMNAME2 END AS FORMINFO FROM EZSTATISTICS.TBDAILYFORMCOUNTLOG A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_S907000.TBFORMINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_S907000.TBFORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# $searchList$ GROUP BY A.FORMID, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2 ORDER BY B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2
